description: C# program that directly calls X509Certificate2.Import() from System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates 6.0.0, triggering CVE-2023-29331 private key extraction vulnerability.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Program.cs directly calls cert.Import() with user-supplied input from args[0]

findings.human_justification: X509Certificate2.Import() is called directly in Main() with untrusted user input from args, making the private key extraction vulnerability exploitable.
